# PHIL.183 ? Value-Based Pricing

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** value_creation
**Subcategory:** value_based_pricing
**Domain:** VALUE_CREATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Price based on value delivered, not costs incurred

## Application
Understand customer value, price to value, justify premium pricing, capture fair share

philosophy, value-creation, value-based-pricing
